name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Orion CLI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? (e.g., "I can't do X because...")

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples from other tools, screenshots, etc.

## Would you be willing to implement this?
[ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
